---
title: "Contact"
title-block-style: none
pagetitle: "Contact | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Contact Dr Mesfin Genie."
page-layout: full
image: /assets/img/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell narrow"><p class="eyebrow">Contact</p><h1>Contact and collaboration</h1><p class="lead">For research collaboration, supervision enquiries, seminars, media or tool-related questions, please use the institutional email below.</p></div></header><section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow"><h2>Email</h2><p><a class="button-primary" href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au">mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au</a></p><h2>Collaboration areas</h2><p>Health economics, discrete choice experiments, eye tracking, behavioural economics, clinical outcomes assessment, vaccine policy, telehealth, decision-support tools and economic evaluation.</p><h2>Professional profiles</h2><p><a href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">University profile</a> · <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar</a> · <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1744-4666" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ORCID</a> · <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mesfin-genie/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a> · <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mesfin-Genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ResearchGate</a> · <a href="https://github.com/DrGenie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a> · <a href="https://x.com/mesfin_genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">X</a></p></div></section>
```
